name: asbatechs-crm-desktop
description: AsbaTechs CRM desktop shell with built-in attendance monitoring
author: AsbaTechs

scripts.dev: npm run build && cross-env CRM_APP_URL=http://localhost:3000 electron .
scripts.clean:release: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; Get-Process 'AsbaTechs CRM','electron' | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if (Test-Path 'release/win-unpacked') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'release/win-unpacked' }; exit 0"
scripts.package:win: npm run clean:release && npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false CSC_LINK= WIN_CSC_LINK= CSC_KEY_PASSWORD= electron-builder --win --config.win.signAndEditExecutable=false --config.directories.output=release-build && powershell -NoProfile -Command "Copy-Item -Force 'release-build/AsbaTechs CRM Setup 0.1.0.exe' 'AsbaTechs-CRM-Setup.exe'"
scripts.package:win:signed: npm run clean:release && npm run build && electron-builder --win --config.win.signAndEditExecutable=true --config.directories.output=release-signed
scripts.package:dir: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win dir --config.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
